commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

Add pivot-aware scanning to network-recon, improve dashboard agent lifecycle

network-recon skill:
- Add "Pivot Mode" section with two-phase scanning approach
- Phase 1: fast host discovery on pivot host (ARP, ping sweep, DNS zone,
  single-port proxychains sweep)
- Phase 2: targeted nmap through proxychains on known-live hosts only
- Document nmap MCP server limitation (no proxychains support)
- Add static nmap alternative for speed-critical scenarios
- Add pivot-specific troubleshooting entries

Dashboard (tail-agent.py):
- Auto-discover new agents from tasks directory (no .dashboard file needed)
- Red *stopped* indicator in pane header for dead agents
- Detect agent completion via JSONL final message + 5s mtime debounce
- Detect killed agents (TaskStop) via 30s mtime staleness
- Keep stopped agents visible instead of auto-removing
- Space bar toggles agents in/out from browser overlay

commit.message:
V1 pricing fallback: use parent room rates for linked/dependent rooms

When a room has 0 V1 rate rules, check raw_data dependencies for
includeBookingsRoomId1 (Beds24's parent room link). If found, use
the parent room's rate rules for pricing. No extra API call needed —
getRates already returns all rooms in the property.

Fixes rooms 550515-550517 (Reine des mers child rooms) which inherit
pricing from parent room 550667 (Villa entière).

commit.message:
Fix background job stuck in pending + rescrape KeyError

- db.py: stale cleanup now catches status IN ('pending', 'running', 'processing')
  so jobs interrupted before ever setting status to 'running' are also cleaned up
- bulk_scraper.py: process_rescrape_job was crashing with KeyError because it
  tried to read ing['grams']/co2/source_db from parse_ingredients output which
  doesn't include those keys; now calls calculate_ingredient() for each ingredient
  and also updates recipe total_co2/co2_per_serving/rating after re-scraping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add help system for Bob

Added built-in help that shows:
- Available commands (monitoring, alerts, SSH)
- Allowed SSH hosts (from config)
- Usage examples and tips

Changes:
- New get_help() tool function
  - Shows available commands with descriptions
  - Lists allowed SSH hosts from SSH_ALLOWED_HOSTS
  - Provides usage examples
  - Optionally reads custom info from HELP.md
- Detection for "help", "commands", "what can you do"
- HELP.md template for custom instructions

Usage:
  "@bob help"
  "@bob what can you do?"
  "@bob list commands"
  "hey @bob what commands are available?"

The HELP.md file is optional and can be customized with:
- Host-specific information
- Common troubleshooting steps
- Team contacts
- Custom instructions

No RAG, no vector DB - just simple text from function + optional file.

commit.message:
fix: Clear pending comment state after backend sync

- Listen to `action-synced` Tauri event in `useActivityData` to
  detect when a comment or reply has been synced to GitLab
- On success, re-fetch comments so the local pending comment is
  replaced by the real GitLab comment with its permanent ID
- On failure, update the matching comment's `syncStatus` to
  `'failed'` using `local_reference_id` from the event payload
- Add `ignore` cleanup flag to the `action-synced` effect to
  prevent stale `listComments` results from being applied after
  `mrId` changes or component unmount
- Add `ignore` cleanup flag to the initial load effect to fix
  the same race condition pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: dispatch release events to public klaus-toolchains repo (#102)

Add giantswarm/klaus-toolchains to the downstream dispatch list so that
new klaus releases trigger version-bump PRs in both the public and
internal toolchains repositories.

Also harden the notify-downstream job:
- Fail the build when DOWNSTREAM_DISPATCH_TOKEN is missing instead of
  silently skipping (matches the CIRCLE_TAG guard behavior).
- Guard against empty HTTP_CODE on curl network failures for clearer
  error diagnostics.

Closes #100

commit.message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.0-beta.42 (Excel Import feature)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(import): add Excel WorkingHours import with smart-merge and conflict resolution

- Add ExcelImportService with smart-merge algorithm (configurable gap threshold)
- Smart-merge collapses consecutive fragmented entries (e.g. 19→3 on 2026-03-02)
  into single WorkEntry with gaps recorded as Pause objects
- Conflict detection: time overlap, duplicate entries, vacation conflicts
- Per-conflict resolution: Skip / Replace / Keep Both
- Add ExcelImportScreen with file picker, merge threshold slider, preview UI
- Fix xlsx absolute path bug: patch xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels before parsing
  (exports using Target="/xl/styles.xml" caused "Damaged Excel file: styles")
- 9 unit/integration tests covering all invariants with real Excel files
- Add file_picker ^8.0.0 dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 4 ABAP Agent core enhancements: DDIC tables, syntax reference, retry loop, BADi discovery

Feature 1 - DDIC Table Creation:
- New create_ddic_table tool to create ABAP Dictionary tables/structures via ADT
- Generates DDIC source with @AbapCatalog annotations, Lock-Write-Unlock-Activate flow

Feature 2 - ABAP Syntax Reference:
- New abap_syntax_reference tool with 40+ in-memory keyword entries
- Covers data declarations, Open SQL, internal tables, OO ABAP, modern 7.40+ syntax
- System prompt updated with critical syntax rules to prevent common errors

Feature 3 - Syntax Error Auto-Retry (max 4 attempts):
- System prompt workflow now mandates syntax_check after every create_abap_program
- Retry instructions: fix all errors, re-write, re-check up to 4 times
- Enhanced _syntaxCheck return value with actionSummary field

Feature 4 - BADi/Enhancement/Exit Discovery:

commit.message:
feat:  rust rewrite from pi-sanbox to agent-sandbox (#1)

* Add dbus and pkg-config deps to Containerfile

* docs: add agent migration tracking and loop prompts

* review-fix: gate cargo validation on Rust workspace scaffold

* docs: confirm rust as migration implementation language

* feat: implement ags Rust launcher with pi agent parity (M1+M2)

Complete Rust rewrite of the shell-based pis launcher as the new ags
multi-agent sandbox launcher. All core modules implemented with 127
passing tests, covering config parsing, launch plan building, podman
execution, SSH agent lifecycle, secret resolution, git config/worktree
detection, browser sidecar, and companion commands (setup, doctor,
update, install/uninstall).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add multi-agent adapter profiles and per-agent launch plans (M3)

Introduce AgentProfile struct with per-agent command, args, env, mounts,
and boot dirs for Pi, Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Opencode. Refactor
build_launch_plan to use profile_for() instead of hardcoded Pi logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: embed assets in binary for standalone distribution

Embed Containerfile, guard.ts, and settings.example.json via
include_str! so ags works without a project checkout. Assets are
written to disk on demand by run, setup, update, doctor, and install.

- New assets module with ensure_containerfile, ensure_guard_extension,
  ensure_settings_template helpers
- Rewrite install command to use embedded assets instead of symlinks
- Doctor self-heals missing Containerfile and guard.ts
- Remove project_root() — no longer needed
- Fix ssh-add to inherit stdio for passphrase prompts
- Kill orphaned ssh-agent before starting fresh (fuser -k)
- Add pnpm store build-cache mounts to Containerfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple agents into persistent volumes with update-agents command and shell mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove legacy shell/python launcher and align on ags

* Drop legacy pis symlink cleanup from install command

* Add create-aliases command for managed wrappers and shell aliases

* Improve container naming and Claude sandbox behavior

* docs: expand user guide and rename pi-sandbox to agent-sandbox

* ci: add release workflow and reusable release prompt

* ci: align release workflow and prompt with qwe

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: unit conversion system for all physical parameters

Add user-configurable display units for Length (cm/mm/m/in), Area,
Mass (kg/g/t/lb), Volume (L/mL/m3/cm3), Density (g/cm3/kg/m3/t/m3),
and Slump (mm/cm/in). Store always holds backend-native SI units;
conversion is purely presentation-layer. Settings persist in localStorage.

- Create frontend/src/lib/units.ts with types, conversion maps, and
  null-safe toStore*/fromStore* functions
- Add UnitPreferences state + localStorage persistence to Zustand store
- Add unit selector card on /reglages settings page
- Convert container dimension inputs on / page (length/area)
- Convert slump input in SlumpForm
- Convert mass inputs in EssaiForm and RpgEssaiForm
- Convert all outputs in ResultsPanel (mass/volume/density) + Excel export
- Convert saved result display in historique/page.tsx
